attached is a log of such a build, but it's not revealing much other than:

=======================<phase: configure      >============================
===>  Configuring for pounce-3.0_2

I just double checked, as said, I run a full successful build, remove the pounce tarball, rebuild, and it fails. If I specify the dependency it works reliably.
